nodes.name: check if dure preavis and categorie pas definie

parameters.query:
select 
  s.XSAL_0 as code_salarie,
  s.XNAMSAL_0 as nom_salarie,
  s.XPRENOM_0 as prenom_salarie,
  s.XEMAIL_0 as email_salarie,
  s.YTELE_0 as telephone_salarie,
  s.YSUP_0 as code_superieur,
  ss.XNAMSAL_0 as nom_superieur,
  ss.XPRENOM_0 as prenom_superieur,
  ss.XEMAIL_0 as email_superieur,
  ss.YTELE_0 as telephone_superieur,
  (SELECT inf.TIDCHAT_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = s.XSAL_0) AS chat_id_salarie,
  (SELECT inf.LAN_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = s.XSAL_0) AS langue_salarie,
  (SELECT inf.TIDCHAT_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = ss.XSAL_0) AS chat_id_superieur,
  (SELECT inf.LAN_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = ss.XSAL_0) AS langue_superieur,
  (SELECT inf.TIDCHAT_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = 'S1479') AS chat_id_rh,
  (SELECT inf.LAN_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = 'S1479') AS langue_rh,
  (SELECT s.XNAMSAL_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.XSAL s WHERE s.XSAL_0 ='S1479' ) AS nom_rh,
  (SELECT s.XPRENOM_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.XSAL s WHERE s.XSAL_0 ='S1479' ) AS prenom_rh,
  (SELECT s.XSAL_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.XSAL s WHERE s.XSAL_0 ='S1479' ) AS code_rh,
  (SELECT s.XEMAIL_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.XSAL s WHERE s.XSAL_0 ='S1479' ) AS email_rh
from jbelrh.JBELRH.XSAL s
left join jbelrh.JBELRH.XSAL ss on ss.XSAL_0=s.YSUP_0
where s.XSAL_0='{{ $json.code_salarie }}'

nodes.name: recuperer les donnes selon le code salarie

parameters.url: =http://192.168.1.210:8124/api1/x3/erp/JBELRH/APLSTD?representation=APLSTD.$query&Where=LANCHP eq 6262 and LAN eq 'FRA' and LANNUM eq {{ $json.XTYPSAL }}
=http://192.168.1.210:8124/api1/x3/erp/JBELRH/APLSTD?representation=APLSTD.$query&Where=LANCHP eq 6263 and LAN eq 'FRA' and LANNUM eq {{ $json.XDURPR }}
